input.quote: The newly inaugurated facility is the first of its kind, with similar fuel skids to be installed across various regions of the country.

questions.question: Has the President actually inaugurated a fuel skid facility for fishermen, and when did this occur?
Were there any fuel skid facilities or similar fuel distribution programs for fishermen in the Maldives prior to this inauguration?
What is the documented price reduction (if any) offered at this fuel skid compared to standard market rates?
Has the government announced concrete plans or timelines for installing similar fuel skids in other regions, and how many are planned?
